name: Real Fyre VR-1A On/Off Variable Flame Remote Kit
description: If there's one gas log accessory that will make your life easier, it's the addition of a remote control. The VR-1A gas burner remote kit from Real Fyre has a simple functionality but a big impact, allowing you to control your gas log burner from the comfort of the couch or even the next room. The on and off buttons pull double-duty by also controlling the height of your burner's flames and, therefore, its heat output. A convenient wall clip included with this kit helps prevent the frustration of losing the remote transmitter among the couch cushions, making the choice that much easier.

name: Napoleon F60 Hand-Held Thermostatic Remote Control with Digital Screen
description:
The Napoleon F60 Hand-Held Thermostatic Remote Control with Digital Screen is really the class of the field when it comes to operating a Napoleon heating appliance. This remote is simple, affordable, and extremely useful to all types of homeowners.

With this remote you get on/off thermostatic control, battery-operated, hand-held design, and an easy-to-read digital screen. The 2-degree temperature swing reduces that annoying short on/off cycling, and it can be set to check the room temperature every 60 seconds and react accordingly. Simplicity, function, and value make the F60 a great choice for your Napoleon appliance.
